phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove ferma il bus per il centro, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh FEHR-mah ee boos per ee CHEN-troh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Outside the exit, on the left.

responses.english: Outside the exit, on the left.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si comprano i biglietti dell'autobus, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see COM-prah-noh ee bee-LYET-tee del-low-toh-BOOS, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the tobacco shop, inside the terminal.

responses.english: At the tobacco shop, inside the terminal.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ogni quanto passa il bus, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, OH-nyee KWAN-toh PAS-sah ee boos, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto dell'autobus, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah ee bee-LYET-toh del-low-toh-BOOS, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si prende il taxi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see PREN-deh ee TAK-see, per fah-VOH-reh
